mcps.name: Office MCP
mcps.app_hint: Start the Office MCP server that exposes Word, PowerPoint, and Excel tools.

mcps.name: CAD MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open the target drawing in AutoCAD, GstarCAD, or ZWCAD before calling CAD tools.

mcps.name: HWP MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open Hancom HWP and keep the HWP MCP server running.

mcps.name: Photoshop MCP
mcps.app_hint: Open Photoshop and the target document before calling Photoshop tools.

mcps.name: Blender MCP
mcps.app_hint: Start Blender and its MCP addon before calling Blender tools.
